name: Number 74: Master of Blades
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>７４ マジカル・クラウン－ミッシング・ソード
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Nanajūyon Majikaru Kuraun - Misshingu Sōdo
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
When a card or effect is activated that targets this face-up card (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then you can destroy 1 card on the field.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 7 monsters
When a card or effect is activated that targets this face-up card (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then you can destroy 1 card on the field.
eff:
2 Level 7 monsters
When a card or effect is activated that targets this face-up card (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then you can destroy 1 card on the field.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
